title: Tired of juggling between Azure DevOps and monday.com?

posts.author: sa07chin (Sachin Singh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Now you don’t have to. The Azure DevOps Connector provides real-time, bi-directional synchronization – ensuring your teams stay aligned, productive, and always in the loop.

Here’s what you get:

Real-Time Sync

  • Automatically sync Azure DevOps Work Items with monday.com boards
  • Bi-directional updates keep both platforms accurate

Custom Field Mapping

  • Choose what data flows and where – tailor syncs to fit your workflow

Track Development Progress in monday.com

  • Get instant visibility into sprint progress, bug tracking, and releases
  • Link tasks, epics, and user stories directly with your project boards

Centralized View of Dev + Ops

  • Break silos between technical and non-technical teams
  • Let product, marketing, and ops collaborate effortlessly on shared boards

Secure, Scalable & Easy to Set Up

  • No complex setups. Just install, connect, and go.
  • Built with enterprise-grade performance and compliance in mind

Whether you’re a Product Manager , Scrum Master , or Dev Lead , this connector helps you spend less time switching tools – and more time shipping great work.

Explore it on the monday.com Marketplace today: Azure DevOps Connector - monday.com Marketplace
